name: Brain CT With Contrast
description: Brain CT report template with intravenous contrast for enhanced lesion detection

findings.technique: Axial images were obtained from the skull base through the vertex following intravenous contrast administration.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Parenchyma
sections.content: The cerebral parenchyma demonstrates [no abnormal contrast enhancement / no mass or lesion / no hemorrhage]. Gray-white matter differentiation is [preserved / adequate].

sections.name: Ventricles
sections.content: The ventricular system is [normal in size / not dilated]. No abnormal enhancement within the ventricles.

sections.name: Midline Structures
sections.content: Midline structures are [midline / centered]. No evidence of herniation.

sections.name: Vascular Structures
sections.content: The dural venous sinuses are [patent / no filling defect]. No abnormal vascular enhancement.

impression:
1. Normal contrast-enhanced study.
2. No abnormal enhancement or mass identified.
author: RadReport Templates
